nonBlockingIssues.highlights: api-client 204 handling, Content-Type on GETs, dynamic import in RSC, missing sign-out error handling
unused error parameter, year-boundary staleness, no client-side password length validation
Y-axis overlap with 3-metric overlay, missing try-catch in ChartTooltip, dual-hook instantiation, non-functional Export button
duplicated OAuth flow logic, stuck loading state on blocked redirect, post-connect pre-sync UX
missing retry in error state, raw textarea instead of shadcn, 'Done' vs 'I've copied the link', @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any suppressions
dead formatAuditEvent() code, URL.createObjectURL memory leak in ExportSection
missing grantId in UI context, no ViewerPageClient unit tests, duplicated toolbar logic, unnecessary 'use client' on ShareExpiredPage, duplicated type definitions
redundant sm:grid-cols-1, weak responsive grid test, skeleton count mismatch, inline styles vs Tailwind utilities

appliedUpdates.description: Added Frontend Patterns section to architecture.md: TanStack Query key factory, API client usage, Recharts dark mode theming via CSS vars, Next.js 15 cookie limitation in RSCs, form library conventions (RHF vs manual state), jest-dom vitest setup, and shadcn/ui Textarea availability note

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Relax the frontend-worker skill's TDD 'write tests FIRST (red phase)' step for UI component work. Allow co-development of tests and implementation when LLD specs are clear. Multiple workers found strict TDD impractical for visual components, layout setup, and shadcn/ui installation.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Features ui-foundation, ui-viewer, and ui-dashboard-charts all deviated from strict TDD in their skillFeedback. All achieved comprehensive test coverage (642 total tests) despite not writing tests first.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify that 'Validation: Zod for all request/response schemas' applies to API-side validation. Client-side form validation may use manual checks for simple wizard flows or React Hook Form + Zod for complex forms. Both are acceptable.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature ui-sharing used manual validation in ShareWizard (inline if-checks) while ui-audit-settings used RHF+Zod for ProfileForm. Both approaches worked correctly. The current AGENTS.md phrasing is ambiguous about whether client-side forms must use Zod.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add react-hook-form and @hookform/resolvers to the project dependencies list in coding conventions, noting they are available for complex forms.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: react-hook-form ^7.71.2 and @hookform/resolvers ^5.2.2 are now in package.json, used by ProfileForm in ui-audit-settings.

rejectedObservations.observation: AGENTS.md should document which shadcn/ui components are installed
rejectedObservations.reason: Too volatile — components are added as needed. Workers should check src/components/ui/ directory directly.

rejectedObservations.observation: OAuth flow pattern duplication should be documented as a reusable hook
rejectedObservations.reason: Localized to two files in one feature. Not systemic enough to warrant shared state documentation.

rejectedObservations.observation: Server vs client session cookie clearing convention should be documented
rejectedObservations.reason: Already clear from the existing auth pattern documentation in architecture.md. The server sets maxAge:0 on cookies in account deletion, which is standard HTTP behavior.

rejectedObservations.observation: api-client.ts convention should be in AGENTS.md
rejectedObservations.reason: Added to library/architecture.md instead. The api-client is self-documenting code, not a normative convention requiring orchestrator guidance.
Already resolved — sonner is what's installed and used. The original feature description's mention of 'toast, toaster' as separate primitives was a LLD artifact.

rejectedObservations.observation: LandingHeader component not in feature description but added
rejectedObservations.reason: Natural addition for a landing page. Not a shared state concern.

rejectedObservations.observation: Auth forms use direct fetch() instead of api-client
rejectedObservations.reason: Duplicate — already addressed by documenting the api-client pattern in library. Auth forms were written before the api-client existed.
Addressed in this synthesis — Next.js 15 cookie limitation and other patterns have been added to library/architecture.md.

rejectedObservations.observation: Dual metric color sources (chart-utils vs config/metrics)
rejectedObservations.reason: Localized design decision — chart-utils has UI-specific colors for overlays while config/metrics has semantic metadata. Not confusing enough to warrant documentation.
